data.name: ResourceNotFound
data.value: The requested resource was not found.

data.name: OperationFailed
data.value: The operation could not be completed.

data.name: InvalidCredentials
data.value: Invalid credentials.

data.name: InvalidRequest
data.value: The sign up request is incomplete.

data.name: DuplicateEmail
data.value: The email is already registered.

data.name: UserNotFound
data.value: The user was not found.

data.name: UserNotAssignedToHotel
data.value: The user is not assigned to the selected hotel.

data.name: HotelNotFound
data.value: The selected hotel was not found.

data.name: InvalidPassword
data.value: The password must have at least 6 characters.

data.name: PasswordResetSuccessfully
data.value: The password was reset successfully.

data.name: Email is required
data.value: Email is required

data.name: Email must have a valid format
data.value: Email must have a valid format

data.name: Email must not exceed 250 characters
data.value: Email must not exceed 250 characters

data.name: Full name is required
data.value: Full name is required

data.name: Full name must have 3 to 250 characters
data.value: Full name must have 3 to 250 characters

data.name: Hotel identifier is required
data.value: Hotel identifier is required

data.name: Hotel identifier must not exceed 64 characters
data.value: Hotel identifier must not exceed 64 characters

data.name: New password is required
data.value: New password is required

data.name: New password must have at least 6 characters
data.value: New password must have at least 6 characters

data.name: New password must not exceed 250 characters
data.value: New password must not exceed 250 characters

data.name: Password is required
data.value: Password is required

data.name: Password must have at least 6 characters
data.value: Password must have at least 6 characters

data.name: Password must not exceed 250 characters
data.value: Password must not exceed 250 characters

data.name: Role is required
data.value: Role is required

data.name: Role must be ADMIN or FRONT_DESK
data.value: Role must be ADMIN or FRONT_DESK

data.name: Status is required
data.value: Status is required

data.name: Status must be active or inactive
data.value: Status must be active or inactive

data.name: Username is required
data.value: Username is required

data.name: Username must use 3 to 100 letters numbers or underscores
data.value: Username must use 3 to 100 letters numbers or underscores

data.name: UserAlreadyActiveInHotel
data.value: The user already belongs to an active hotel.
